channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump says he will ‘most likely’ will give TikTok 90-day extension
item.description: President-elect Trump told NBC News on Saturday that he is likely to give TikTok a 90-day extension while his incoming administration assesses the situation following the Supreme Court decision to uphold a federal ban.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Live updates: Trump inauguration weekend commences as protesters rally in Washington
item.description: Inauguration festivities will begin in full force Saturday as President-elect Trump and his allies — and protesters — arrive in Washington ahead of Monday's inauguration of the 47th president of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, Fox 5

item.title: Need to get a tattoo removed? What to know about the risks, the cost and more
item.description: When you’re young and carefree, a spur-of-the-moment tattoo feels like the ultimate form of self-expression. Years later, though, you might have a change of heart.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Eggs are about to get even more expensive, expert says. Here's how much
item.description: Eggs are nearly 40% more expensive now than they were a year ago, the Labor Department said this week. It's about to get even worse, one expert says.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Resettlement agencies race to help refugees ahead of Trump's second term
item.description: NEW MILFORD, Conn. (AP) — Rogers Lopez knows just how lucky his family is as they settle into their furnished two-bedroom apartment in suburban Connecticut, just before President-elect Donald Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Thousands converge on Washington for a march days before Trump takes office
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Thousands of people from around the United States were rallying in the nation's capital Saturday for women's reproductive rights and other causes they believe are under threat from the incoming Trump administration, reprising the original Women's March days before President-elect D
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and ASHRAF KHALIL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How to build a budget to help you save in 2025
item.description: NewsNation spoke with a financial expert about how to build a budget that could help you start the year off with less financial stress.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: The baby names going 'extinct' in 2025, according to BabyCenter
item.description: Much like the doomed flightless dodo, baby names like “Emory,” “Jamie” or “Remy” are quickly being stamped out by the same humans who once found them so uniquely remarkable.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Who is Sean Curran? Head of Trump's personal detail to be nominated for Secret Service director
item.description: Sean Curran, the head of President-elect Trump's personal security detail, will be tapped to lead the U.S. Secret Service, according to the president's son.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Navajo Nation firefighters battle wildfires in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Firefighters from the Navajo Nation worked tirelessly through a haze of dust to cut away dirt from a narrow road at the side of a mountain struck by a landslide in Southern California, coughing and sneezing amid the backbreaking work.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LOCHER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bribery, fraud charges dropped against former New York Lt. Governor
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal prosecutors on Friday dropped bribery and fraud charges against former New York Lt. Gov. Brian Benjamin, citing the death of a cooperating witness against the Democrat who the governor had once chosen to be her second-in-command. Judge J.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to know about RedNote, a TikTok alternative
item.description: TikTok patrons are turning to a new platform in light of the nationwide ban set to shut down the app on Sunday. RedNote, a Chinese short-form video platform, is gaining ground as users look for an alternative to the social media company owned by the China's ByteDance.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KTLA 5

item.title: A battery plant fire in California started during a boom for energy storage
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — A fire at one of the world’s largest battery plants in Northern California contained tens of thousands of lithium batteries that store power from renewable energy and have become a growing electricity source.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY and NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fires scorched campuses across Los Angeles. Many schools are seeking places to hold classes
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Days after losing her home in the same fire that destroyed her Los Angeles elementary school, third-grader Gabriela Chevez-Muñoz resumed classes this week at another campus temporarily hosting children from her school.
item.dc:creator: KRYSTA FAURIA, JOCELYN GECKER and CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 6 people injured after dump truck crashes into New Jersey Target
item.description: A dump truck crashed into a Target in New Jersey Friday, opening up a large hole in the side of the building and leaving several people injured.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Oakland mayor, longtime partner indicted in alleged bribery scheme
item.description: OAKLAND (AP) — Former Oakland Mayor Sheng Thao, her longtime partner and two local businessmen were named in an indictment unsealed Friday alleging the four conspired to funnel city business to companies owned by the men in exchange for money and benefits to Thao and her partner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Teen MS-13 victim's father slams last-minute Biden DOJ plea deal
item.description: Robert Mickens says no murderers should be granted plea deals, but this one comes as a 'slap in the face' with a suspect who admitted to killing seven.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas cheerleader accused of poisoning rival's show goat barred from caring for her pets on her own
item.description: Aubrey Vanlandingham, 17, cannot care for any animals and can only visit her own pets under adult supervision after allegedly force-feeding poison to a rival student's show goat.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judges hand down what could be the last punishments for the Jan. 6 riot before pardons from Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal judge who oversaw Donald Trump's 2020 election interference case denounced efforts to rewrite the history of the U.S. Capitol attack Friday as she handed down what she acknowledged may be one of the final punishments for the Jan.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Sealy Mattress company is sued after Georgia man was found dead inside a locked trailer
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A Georgia man suffering a mental health crisis wandered into a Sealy Mattress facility, and his body was found locked inside the back of a truck there about a week later, his family says in a wrongful death lawsuit filed this week.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to save your TikTok videos, data ahead of looming ban
item.description: Barring a last-minute turnaround, the popular social media app will be unavailable in all 50 states Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Ramaswamy plans run for Ohio governor
item.description: Vivek Ramaswamy, the co-chair of President-elect Trump's new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), plans to run for governor of Ohio, two sources confirmed to The Hill on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KRON4

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, Fox 5

item.title: Bail denied for American captured in France and accused of assaulting Pennsylvania student
item.description: EAST BERLIN, Pa. (AP) — An American accused of sexually assaulting a college student in 2013 and later sending her a Facebook message that said “So I raped you” was ordered held without bail Friday during a court hearing in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Top NJ watchdog official abruptly resigns, is removed from state voter rolls following residency flap
item.description: Tiffany Williams Brewer reportedly claimed a Maryland property as her principal residence, but later voted in New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants one of the agents who covered him after he was shot to lead the Secret Service
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump will choose to lead the U.S. Secret Service one of the agents who covered him after a gunmen opened fire at the candidate during a campaign rally in Pennsylvania. Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Durbin seeks information from Patel personnel files at national security agencies
item.description: Editor's note: This story has been updated to correct the committee that Durbin leads. Sen. Dick Durbin (Ill.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Trump inauguration moved indoors because of freezing temperatures
item.description: President-elect Trump’s inauguration ceremony is being moved indoors because of expected bitter cold Monday in Washington, D.C. Trump and Vice President-elect JD Vance are expected to be sworn in inside the Capitol Rotunda rather than on the West Front of the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Feral swine to be removed from Land Between the Lakes
item.description: Feral swine, a non-native species, are not only threatening visitor safety and cultural sites, but are also digging up native plants.
item.dc:creator: Davis Nolan, NewsNation

item.title: Senate advances Laken Riley Act, teeing up final vote
item.description: The Senate voted Friday to advance the Laken Riley Act, putting Republicans a step closer to sending the first bill of the 119th Congress to President-elect Trump for his signature next week and giving him an early win on one of his key issues.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Bruce Willis shakes hands with first responders in rare public appearance
item.description: Amid the devastating wildfires in Southern California, Bruce Willis took time to thank first responders.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WGN 9

item.title: Texas lawmakers urge Trump's Secretary of State pick to get tough with Mexico on water payments
item.description: Several Texas lawmakers have asked President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee for Secretary to State to help urge Mexico to pay the water it owes the United States.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court upholds TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday unanimously upheld a law requiring TikTok’s China-based parent company to divest from the app, teeing up a ban set to take effect Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WGN 9

item.title: Where are they? Help sought finding those missing after Eaton Fire in California
item.description: Authorities are asking the public for help in their search for several Altadena residents who remain unaccounted for after the deadly Eaton Fire burned thousands of homes.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KRON4

item.title: WATCH: Police chase suspects on bikes in Los Angeles area
item.description: Police chased two suspects in the Los Angeles area as they fled on motor bikes, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Longer prison terms for human smugglers sought by US Justice Department
item.description: "We're trying to get the leaders of these smuggling groups to get longer sentences or those who work with cartels in Mexico to conduct their smuggling.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, Fox 5
